description: When SPY > SMA30: hold 60% SPY + 40% top sector. Below: cash.

how_it_works.sma_gate: Check DAILY at close: is SPY above its 30-day moving average?
how_it_works.when_above: Hold 60% SPY + 40% best sector ETF (by 63-day momentum)
how_it_works.when_below: 100% cash — no positions. Wait for SPY to cross back above.
how_it_works.sector_pick: Sector ETF chosen on the 1st trading day of each month. Stays the same all month.
how_it_works.trades_per_year: ~26 (monthly sector rotations + daily SMA entries/exits in SPY)
